items.title: Notion just turned its workspace into a hub for AI agents
items.summary: Notion has integrated AI agents directly into its workspace, allowing users to automate tasks and enhance productivity within their existing workflows.

items.title: Musk’s xAI is running nearly 50 gas turbines unchecked at its Mississippi data center
items.summary: xAI is reportedly operating a large number of gas turbines at its Mississippi data center without proper regulatory oversight, raising environmental and safety concerns.

items.title: Salesforce rolls out new Slackbot AI agent as it battles Microsoft and Google in workplace AI
items.summary: Salesforce has launched a new Slackbot AI agent, intensifying its competition with Microsoft and Google in the rapidly evolving workplace AI market.

items.title: Anthropic’s Cat Wu says that, in the future, AI will anticipate your needs before you know what they are
items.summary: A key figure at Anthropic envisions a future where AI systems will proactively understand and address user needs even before they are consciously recognized.

items.title: World Action Models: The Next Frontier in Embodied AI
items.summary: This paper explores 'World Action Models' as a critical advancement for embodied AI, enabling agents to better understand and interact with complex environments.

items.title: The creator of Claude Code just revealed his workflow, and developers are losing their minds
items.summary: The workflow of Claude Code's creator has been unveiled, captivating developers with its innovative approach to AI-assisted coding.

items.title: AlphaGRPO: Unlocking Self-Reflective Multimodal Generation in UMMs via Decompositional Verifiable Reward
items.summary: AlphaGRPO introduces a novel method for self-reflective multimodal generation in Universal Multimodal Models by using a decompositional verifiable reward system.

items.title: Building a safe, effective sandbox to enable Codex on Windows
items.summary: OpenAI details the development of a secure and functional sandbox environment to facilitate the integration and use of Codex on Windows operating systems.

items.title: Reduce friction and latency for long-running jobs with Webhooks in Gemini API
items.summary: Google has enhanced the Gemini API with webhooks, allowing developers to reduce friction and latency for long-running asynchronous tasks.

items.title: How to Save Bloated MCP with Code Mode
items.summary: This article discusses strategies for optimizing and reducing the size of 'Bloated MCP' (likely a software project or model) using a 'Code Mode' approach.

items.title: ToolCUA: Towards Optimal GUI-Tool Path Orchestration for Computer Use Agents
items.summary: ToolCUA proposes a framework for optimal orchestration of GUI-tool paths, aiming to improve the efficiency and effectiveness of computer use agents.

items.title: Lambda Just Got a File System. I Put AI Agents on It.
items.summary: AWS Lambda now supports file systems, enabling developers to deploy and run AI agents directly within serverless functions for more complex operations.

items.title: L2P: Unlocking Latent Potential for Pixel Generation
items.summary: L2P presents a new technique designed to unlock the latent potential within models for more effective and high-quality pixel generation.

items.title: Multi-Stream LLMs: Unblocking Language Models with Parallel Streams of Thoughts, Inputs and Outputs
items.summary: This research introduces Multi-Stream LLMs, a novel architecture that uses parallel streams for thoughts, inputs, and outputs to enhance language model efficiency and capability.

items.title: What Parameter Golf taught us about AI-assisted research
items.summary: OpenAI shares insights gained from 'Parameter Golf,' a project that explored the effectiveness and challenges of AI-assisted research methodologies.
